question: How does revenue compare year over year?
sql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM oi.created_at) AS year,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year
report: Annual revenue has grown every year, from $102,841 in 2019 to $1.90M in 2024 - roughly an 18x increase over five years. Growth stayed strong throughout: 2023 ($1.31M) to 2024 ($1.90M) alone was +45%. The business is on a consistent, steep upward trajectory.
